page.title: Windoform Definitions
page.description: Manage profile, rebar, screw, and print records using the same paged table pattern as other definition screens.

profil.title: Profile definitions
profil.description: Manage profile options selectable on document lines.

demir.title: Rebar definitions
demir.description: Manage rebar options selectable on document lines.

vida.title: Screw definitions
vida.description: Manage screw options selectable on document lines.

baski.title: Print definitions
baski.description: Manage print options selectable on document lines.

koliBaski.title: Package print definitions
koliBaski.description: Manage package print options selected on the quotation header and sent to the Netsis header description.
